channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Third British skier dies as another avalanche hits French Alps
item.description: Death of Briton along with Polish citizen near La Grave comes four days after fatal avalanche at Val d’Isère A third British man has been killed in an...

item.title: Ryanair may let dual nationals board UK flights without a British passport
item.description: Airline statement will reassure Britons abroad anxious about new immigration rules coming into effect next week British dual nationals may be able to ...

item.title: Starmer urged to stick to manifesto pledge amid reports of delay to youth minimum wage rise – UK politics live
item.description: GMB union tells Labour delaying or halting equalisation to adult rates would be unacceptable Rachel Reeves , the chancellor, has recorded a pooled cli...

item.title: Boss of BAE Systems urges ministers to publish delayed military spending plan
item.description: CEO of UK’s biggest defence company says delay is holding back investment as BAE posts record sales The boss of Britain’s biggest defence company has ...

item.title: Zelenskyy says peace talks could have reached final stage but Russia ‘dragging out negotiations’ – Europe live
item.description: ‘Difficult’ and ‘very tense’ negotiations end abruptly after about two hours, reports say The peace talks ended abruptly today after about two hours, ...

item.title: 'Cowards' - Vinicius speaks out as Benfica deny racism claims
item.description: The Champions League match between Real Madrid and Benfica was halted for 10 minutes, with both sets of players leaving the pitch.

item.title: Plan to increase youth minimum wage could be delayed
item.description: Government sources tell BBC News they could slow down plans to make minimum wage equal across age groups.

item.title: Cynthia Erivo ignores online criticism as Dracula gets mixed reviews
item.description: The Wicked star appears in a one-woman version of the classic horror story in London's West End.

item.title: Police assessing Stansted Airport private flights over Epstein ties
item.description: Essex Police says it is assessing information in relation to private flights into and out of the airport.

item.title: Child abuse increasing and more complex to police, crime agency says
item.description: Police cannot tackle the issue alone, the NCA says, and technology companies must do more.
